emails.body:
From: Account Security <support-phish-002@secure-mail.example>
To: LCDR James Maddox <james.maddox@jiaitf.example>
Date: Wed, 30 Sep 2026 07:24:00 -0400
Subject: Action required #1

LCDR Maddox,

Our monitoring system indicates your Common Access Card (CAC) certificates are due for mandatory renewal within 48 hours. Failure to update will result in suspension of network access, VPN, and email services.

Required action:
1. Click the secure portal link below
2. Authenticate with current CAC PIN
3. Complete certificate renewal wizard

Secure Portal: https://cac-renewal-services.example/portal/auth?uid=JMADD002

This automated notice is generated by the DoD Identity Management Division. Do not reply to this message. For assistance, contact your local ID card office or the Enterprise Service Desk at 1-800-555-0199.

Respectfully,
Account Security Team
DoD Identity Management Division

---
This is an official U.S. Government notification. Unauthorized use or distribution is prohibited.
